channel.title: Posts on E-daemonia
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on E-daemonia

item.title: Laughing Alone (獨笑)
item.description: This is but how the world goes all the time / Alone I laugh, and none do understand!

item.title: Is "Narcissistic Abuse" a useful term?
item.description: ‘Narcissistic abuse’ as a term is extremely stigmatizing to people with NPD while its utility to survivors seems limited.

item.title: No True Dragon (非眞龍)
item.description: The dragon that can be penned in is no true dragon.

item.title: Wind Blows Through the Bamboo Sparse (風來疎竹)
item.description: Though wind blows through the bamboo sparse / When it has passed the wood does not the sound retain.

item.title: How I Got into Emacs
item.description: The true gift of Emacs may be the ability to make it your own in every sense.

item.title: Mu4e Error in Process Sentinel: Mu Server Process Ended with Exit 1
item.description: Shutting down mu server turned out to be effective when mu4e wouldn’t start.

item.title: Troubleshooting "Unmanaged Device" Network Connection Error
item.description: Here’s how I solved it when there was an unmanaged device error with NetworkManager and systemd.

item.title: Honking Osprey (關雎)
item.description: The honking osprey rests upon / The islands of the River great / The lady of good bearing is / The man of virtue’s perfect mate.

item.title: The Feminist Pansori
item.description: Pansori, a musical form born in openly misogynistic 17th-century Korea, recognizes and celebrates the humanity and worth of women in culturally and historically specific ways.

item.title: No, Andrew Lee Is Not the "Crown Prince of Korea" (there is someone who comes close, though)
item.description: The Korean-American businessman Andrew Lee is not the Crown Prince of Korea. The last Crown Prince of Korea has a living heir, though, which is in many ways a more interesting story. One that requires diagrams.

item.title: My Simple Directory Backup with a systemd Timer
item.description: How I set up a systemd timer for regular automated backups of selected directories.

item.title: On Gardening (種花)
item.description: 開落摠愁人 未識種花 In bloom and fade I worry all the same; My heart does but the garden’s joys evade.
